data.title: VeChain's Evearn App collaborates with Smartcar for B3TR token rewards to 30+ EV brands in Europe and North America.
data.description: The integration of Evearn and Smartcar now allows electric and hybrid vehicle drivers in Europe and North America to earn B3TR token rewards through the VeChain blockchain.

data.title: Inventor creates backpack (CLM-856) to secure mobile IV machine, providing freedom for child with cancer.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, a parent shared their personal experience of caring for their child with cancer who needs constant IV treatment at home. They expressed the need for a better solution to allow their child to move around and participate in activities while receiving 24/7 intravenous therapy.

data.title: Echo Global Logistics to acquire ITS Logistics in a definitive agreement. Leading provider of technology-enabled transportation services announces the acquisition.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Chicago, Echo Global Logistics, Inc. disclosed their plan to acquire ITS Logistics, a prominent North American firm. Echo, known for its tech-driven transportation and supply chain solutions, finalized the agreement with ITS to further enhance their services. This acquisition marks a significant move for Echo in strengthening its position within the industry.

data.title: Nasdaq slightly down, Dow up 0.3% at 48,632.75, while NASDAQ fell 0.06% to 22,940.77. Johnson & Johnson beats estimates.
data.description: In the U.S., stock trading was mixed with Dow up 0.30% at 48,632.75, NASDAQ down 0.06% at 22,940.77, and S&P 500 rising by 0.16% to 6,807.83 midway through trading on Wednesday. Energy shares surged by 2%, while consumer staples stocks fell by 0.5%. Johnson & Johnson reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings with adjusted earnings of $2.46 per share (up 20.6% YoY) and sales of $24.56 billion (up 9.1% YoY). The company issued fiscal 2026 guidance with adjusted earnings of $11.43-$11.63 and sales of $99.50 billion-$100.5 billion. PAVmed Inc (NASDAQ: PAVM) was one of the equities trading up. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Zions Bancorp beats Q4 earnings with $1.76 per share, surpassing $862.818M sales estimate. Shares rose by 31%.
data.description: Zions Bancorporation (NASDAQ: ZION) announced strong fourth-quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly earnings of $1.76 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.57 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales amounted to $879.000 million, beating the projected $862.818 million. Harris H. Simmons, Chairman and CEO of Zions Bancorporation, expressed satisfaction with the results, noting a 31% increase in earnings per share compared to the previous year. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Post-it maker 3M surpasses Q4 2025 earnings with $6.023 billion in sales and adjusts EPS by 9% Y/Y to $1.83. Projects 2026 adjusted EPS of $8.50-$8.70 and sales of $25.250 billion. Bank of America analyst raises EPS estimates amid positive growth outlook.
data.description: 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) stock saw an increase after surpassing fourth-quarter earnings expectations. In the reported quarter of 2025, the company achieved adjusted sales of $6.023 billion, slightly above the predicted $6.012 billion. The adjusted earnings per share grew by 9% year-over-year to $1.83, exceeding the expected $1.80. Looking ahead to 2026, 3M anticipates an adjusted EPS between $8.50 and $8.70, higher than the projected $8.61, with an adjusted sales outlook around $25.250 billion compared to the estimated $25.040 billion. Post these results, Bank of America Securities analyst Andrew Obin increased the company's EPS predictions while upholding a Buy rating with a target price of $200.

data.title: Netflix's growth slowing, execs defend $72 billion Warner Bros deal despite disappointing guidance.
data.description: The growth of Netflix is decelerating, although company executives have rejected the suggestion that this is the motive behind their acquisition of Warner Bros for $72 billion. There has been disappointment in Netflix's guidance following this acquisition. Executives are defending their decision to pursue the deal with Warner Bros.

data.title: Gold hits record high, nears $5,000 as Trump speaks. Bond buying rises, Treasury yield falls.notEmpty
data.description: Gold prices reached an all-time high recently as President Donald Trump addressed attendees at the Davos conference. The precious metal is now targeting the $5,000 mark. Additionally, bond purchasing has seen a resurgence, causing Treasury yields to decrease. The current surge in gold prices is attributed to a trend known as the 'Sell America' trade.

data.title: SLB buys RESMAN Energy Tech from Nordic Capital, with Pickering Energy Partners assisting in the acquisition.
data.description: In a recent deal, SLB has successfully purchased RESMAN Energy Technology from Nordic Capital. The acquisition was facilitated by Pickering Energy Partners on behalf of Nordic Capital. This transaction underscores a significant move in the industry, with important numbers involved in the deal yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Justices signal Supreme Court likely to reject Trump's bid to immediately dismiss Fed governor, citing independence concerns.
data.description: In a recent hearing, certain justices expressed worry that the president's actions to remove Lisa Cook might endanger the independence of the central bank.

data.title: LTC forecast: Short-term target $72-75, medium-term $75-87, bullish at $88, support at $64. Analysts optimistic.
data.description: Summary of LTC Price Predictions: Analysts foresee a short-term target of $72-75 within a week and a medium-term forecast ranging from $75 to $87. A bullish breakout may occur at $88 while a critical support level rests at $64.

data.title: Whirlpool Corp recognized as one of "World's Most Admired Companies" for 16th year by Fortune.
data.description: Whirlpool Corporation, headquartered in Benton Harbor, Michigan, was recently acknowledged by Fortune for the sixteenth consecutive year as one of the "World's Most Admired Companies." This recognition underscores the company's continued success and esteemed reputation in the industry. The achievement highlights Whirlpool Corporation's consistent performance and outstanding standing among its peers. This acknowledgment is a testament to the company's enduring commitment to excellence and innovation.

data.title: Ficus Education & University of the Cumberlands offer debt-free college to frontline workers, expanding access to tuition-covered online degrees for Chick-fil-A & QSR employees nationwide. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: Expansion of a program offering tuition-covered, career-aligned online degrees for employees of independent Chick-fil-A Operators and QSR Franchisees across the country was revealed by Ficus Education and the University of the Cumberlands based in ALPHARETTA, Ga., on Jan. 21, 2026. This initiative aims to assist team members in upskilling and advancing in their careers, potentially impacting a substantial number of individuals in the fast-food industry.

data.title: FedLearn introduces Mission Readiness Knowledge Index, revolutionizing U.S. Department of War's workforce readiness measurement.
data.description: A company based in Alexandria, Va., called FedLearn is changing the way workforce readiness is assessed in the U.S. Department of War. This online learning solutions provider uses artificial intelligence to customize content that aligns with the federal government's goals. The innovation was announced on Jan. 21, 2026.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to BMO 2026-C14, a $631.6 million CMBS transaction backed by 27 loans on 89 properties.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 16 classes of BMO 2026-C14, a CMBS conduit transaction worth $631.6 million. This deal is backed by 27 commercial mortgage loans tied to 89 properties across 36 MSAs. The three largest markets within the portfolio are Norfolk (8.8% of pool balance), Detroit (8.7%), and Albany-Schenectady-Troy, NY (8.7%). The diverse pool includes various property types, with exposure to the most major categories.

data.title: Fifth Third Bancorp beats Q4 earnings expectations, reports $1.08 EPS and $2.344B revenue. Analysts revise forecasts.
data.description: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) exceeded expectations in its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported earnings of $1.08 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 99 cents per share. However, quarterly sales were slightly lower than anticipated at $2.344 billion, missing the estimate of $2.392 billion. Tim Spence, Chairman, CEO, and President of Fifth Third, highlighted the company's strong performance throughout the year, with record NII and profitable relationship growth. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.32-$0.35 by Feb 2026 with current price at $0.30. Analysis shows potential targets in 30 days if resistance is broken.
data.description: TRON's (TRX) current price stands at $0.30 with a neutral momentum, accompanied by bullish MACD signals. Analysts predict potential targets of $0.32-$0.35 within the next 30 days if the resistance level is surpassed. The technical analysis indicates a promising outlook for TRX in the near future.

data.title: Global wearable fall detector market to reach USD 3.7 billion by 2035, from USD 1.9 billion in 2025, at a CAGR of 6.6%.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 21, 2026, the worldwide market for wearable fall detectors is worth $1.9 billion in 2025. Analysts forecast this market to grow to $3.7 billion by 2035, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.6% throughout the forecasted period. These insights are from a report by Future Market...

data.title: Limble appoints Gary Specter as CEO to lead company growth. Utah-based modern maintenance platform.
data.description: An experienced CEO, Gary Specter, has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of Limble, a modern maintenance and asset management platform based in LEHI, Utah. The announcement was made on Jan. 21, 2026. Specter brings with him extensive experience to drive the company's growth and enhance customer value. This move is aimed at propelling Limble into its next phase of development.
